html:div.class: pt-2 animate-fade-in
flex items-center gap-3 mb-4
bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 p-4 mb-4

html:h3.class: text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3

html:div.class: bg-[#f2faf7] rounded-xl p-3 border border-emerald-50 mb-3 flex flex-col items-center
flex justify-center items-end gap-1.5 py-4 h-32 w-full
w-10 h-24 bg-green-100 rounded-md border-2 border-emerald-600 flex flex-col justify-between items-center p-1 shadow-sm relative transition-all hover:scale-105

html:span.class: text-[6px] font-black text-emerald-800 uppercase leading-none text-center

html:div.class: w-full h-10 bg-emerald-500 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[7px] font-bold
w-12 h-26 bg-yellow-100 rounded-md border-2 border-yellow-600 flex flex-col justify-between items-center p-1.5 shadow-sm relative transition-all hover:scale-105
w-full h-11 bg-amber-500 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[7px] font-bold
w-16 h-28 bg-[#fdf3e2] rounded-lg border-2 border-[#f37a20] flex flex-col justify-between items-center p-1.5 shadow-md relative transition-all hover:scale-105
absolute -top-1 left-2 w-3 h-1.5 bg-[#f37a20] rounded-sm

html:span.class: text-[8px] font-black text-[#f37a20] uppercase leading-none mt-1

html:div.class: w-full h-12 bg-[#fab915] rounded flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-0.5
w-12 h-26 bg-sky-100 rounded-md border-2 border-sky-600 flex flex-col justify-between items-center p-1.5 shadow-sm relative transition-all hover:scale-105
w-full h-11 bg-sky-500 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[7px] font-bold
w-10 h-24 bg-amber-50 rounded-md border-2 border-amber-400 flex flex-col justify-between items-center p-1 shadow-sm relative transition-all hover:scale-105
w-full h-10 bg-amber-300 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[7px] font-bold
flex gap-1 justify-center mt-2
bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden divide-y divide-slate-100
p-4 flex justify-between items-center hover:bg-slate-50 active:bg-orange-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer
p-4 flex justify-between items-center hover:bg-slate-50 active:bg-orange-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer
p-4 flex justify-between items-center hover:bg-slate-50 active:bg-orange-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer
flex items-center gap-2

html:span.class: w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse
